title: Account
subtitle: your data is yours
coachDataContact: Want to export or delete your account? Write to us at
installAppSub: Add it to your home screen to open it like an app, no browser needed.
installIosSub: On iPhone/iPad: tap the Share icon in your browser and choose "Add to Home Screen".
linkedDemoSub: In the real app you’ll see your link status here.
linkActiveSub: Active link — your coach sees your training.
requestSentSub: Waiting for your coach to confirm.
enterCode: Enter the code your coach gave you. Once they confirm it, you’re linked.
dataIntro: Everything here is yours: download it whenever you want, or delete it forever.
deleteConfirm: Delete permanently? This erases everything and can’t be undone.
deleteError: Couldn’t delete the account. Try again.
